description: DocuSign envelopes + templates: send for signature, fetch envelope/template by ID, browse templates and users.
notes: Each profile/bot signs in with its own DocuSign user. DocuSign's API doesn't have a single 'list envelopes' tool — envelopes are typically retrieved by ID, often handed off from another system (e.g. a Pipedrive deal reference). Adjust the allowlist if your use case needs search or batch operations.
